_note: Reference baseline captured on Windows 10 / Ryzen-class hardware against MockMerchant on localhost. Numbers are not directly comparable to baseline-v0.8.0.json (M3 MacBook Pro) — for the v1.0.0 final baseline, re-run on M3 reference hardware at the v1.0.0-rc.1 tag. The harness measures SDK overhead via a stubbed LLM adapter; it is a sanity check, not an SLA.

tokensPerTask._note: Synthetic — derived from the stub LLM's char/4 token approximation; reflects SDK message-building overhead, not real provider usage.
